NOTICE OF MOTION TO ENFORCE WRITTEN SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT NDER CCP 664.6; REQUEST FOR COSTS AND ATTORNEYS FEES PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT WEBCOR BUILDERS, INC. PULIDO, JESUS HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS WEBCOR BUILDERS, INC. AND JESUS PULIDO'S MOTION TO ENFORCE WRITTEN SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT UNDER CCP 664.6; REQUEST FOR COSTS AND ATTORNEYS FEES PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. THE COURT GRANTS THIS MOTION. THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT THAT THE PARTIES EXECUTED AT THE MEDIATION IS BINDING. SEE GAVINA V. SMITH, (1944) 25 CAL.2D 501, 504. THE COURT DENIES DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR FEES. PAR. 6 OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PROVIDES THAT EACH PARTY WILL BEAR ITS OWN LITIGATION COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES. PAR. 10 DOES NOT PROVIDE FOR INDEMNIFICATION IN CONNECTION WITH THIS MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MATTER CONTINUED FROM DEC-19-2011 TO MAR-19-2012 FOR COMPLIANCE. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, COURT REPORTER: TEANNA WARD, CSR #11918

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Written Settlement Agreement Nder Ccp 664.6; Request For Costs And Attorneys Fees Pursuant To Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS WEBCOR BUILDERS, INC. and JESUS PULIDO'S Motion To Enforce Written Settlement Agreement Under CCP 664.6 is Off calendar. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-19-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Written Settlement Agreement Nder Ccp 664.6; Request For Costs And Attorneys Fees Pursuant To Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Continued To Mar-19-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Marie A. Trimble, Esq., from Gordon & Rees, LLP, 415-986-5900, for Defendant and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. DEFENDANTS WEBCOR BUILDERS, INC. AND JESUS PULIDO'S Notice Of Motion To Enforce Written Settlement Agreement Under Ccp 664.6; Request For Costs And Attorneys Fees Pursuant To Settlement Agreement.
The Court grants this motion. The settlement agreement that the parties executed at the mediation is binding. See Gavina v. Smith, (1944) 25 Cal.2d 501, 504. The Court denies defendant's request for fees. Par. 6 of the settlement agreement provides that each party will bear its own litigation costs and attorney fees. Par. 10 does not provide for indemnification in connection with this motion. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla Miller, Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918
